title: Marshlaw's Custom Armors
description: This mod Implement 50+ Armors to the Minecraft
body: ![Marshlaw Custom Armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/469ed9d9e151669d6b6beee417dcf440d204f052.png) # This Mod Adds 50+ Armors To The Game ## Some Of The Armors have **Special Ability** This Mod is For **Fun**. Its **unbalanced** Its made in Mcreator **Armors** - Oak Log Armor - Oak Planks Armor - Spruce Log Armor - Spruce Planks Armor - Birch Log Armor - Birch Planks Armor - Dark Oak Log Armor - Dark Oak Planks Armor - Acacia Log Armor - Acacia Planks Armor - Snow Armor - Magma Armor (Special Ability) - Melon Armor - Pumpkin Armor - Pumpkin Carved Armor - Jack'o Lanter Armor (Special Ability) - **Command Block Armor** (Special Ability) - **Bedrock Armor** (Special Ability) - **All** type of Glass Armor (Special Ability) - **All** types of Wool Armor - Slime Block Armor (Special Ability) - Dirt Armor - Grass Block Armor - Stone Armor - Cobblestone Armor - Deepslate Armor - Cobble Deepslate Armor - Polished Andesite Armor - Andesite Armor - Polished Granite Armor - Granite Armor - **TNT Armor** (Special Ability) Screen Shots ![Special Ability Armors](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c36ed6f27bc541e8a9d610ef9b9659e8d7f7bb7a.png) ![All Stone Types](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0011bf172e61741d9085e18df0b893be50ac49ab.png) ![All Glass Types](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7ffef89fe3ff3711b34670bb86abaaca9a25c965.png) ![All Wool Types](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/92e1320fc26c38c7b472391c2094abe41a8247f3.png) **Consider Donating. Thanks** **https://buymeacoffee.com/marshlaw**
